headline: Alejandro Garnacho
body: 🚨🟣🔵 Understand Aston Villa sent official bid to Chelsea for Alejandro Garnacho - following exclusive story about initial talks on Friday. Initial loan with buy clause included being discussed as Unai Emery approved Garnacho as target. Talks ongoing also player side w/ AVFC.
raw_text:
🚨🟣🔵 Understand Aston Villa sent official bid to Chelsea for Alejandro Garnacho - following exclusive story about initial talks on Friday.

Initial loan with buy clause included being discussed as Unai Emery approved Garnacho as target.

Talks ongoing also player side w/ #AVFC.
text:

draft_caption:
✅ LOAN- ALEJANDRO GARNACHO FERREYRA CONFIRMED LOAN MOVE FROM CHELSEA TO ASTON VILLA.
